_comment: Global settings apply to all chains. Per-chain settings override globals. Set 'null' to use dynamic values or disable a filter.

global._comment_mode: Options: 'testnet' (only testnet chains), 'mainnet' (only mainnet chains), 'all' (everything enabled)
global._comment_concurrency: How many wallets run in parallel. Keep low to avoid RPC rate limits.
global._comment_delay: [min, max] seconds of random delay between wallets. Reduces detection and API hammering.
global._comment_cooldown: Hours between mint sessions per wallet. 24 = once per day.
global._comment_cooldown_on_fail: If true, cooldown is set even if all mints fail. If false, cooldown only set on any success.
global._comment_target_mints: [min, max] random number of NFTs to mint per wallet per session.
global._comment_index_cache_hours: How long to use the cached collection list before refreshing from API.
global._comment_max_api_pages: Max pages to fetch from Sweep Haus API per refresh (16 items/page).

x1_testnet._comment: X1 EcoChain Testnet — free airdrop farming
x1_testnet._comment_max_price_native: Max price per NFT in native token. 0 = free only. null = no limit.
x1_testnet._comment_gas_price_gwei: Set gas price in Gwei. null = use on-chain eth_gasPrice dynamically.
x1_testnet._comment_gas_limit: Hard gas limit per transaction. 280000 is safe for most Sweep Haus claim().
x1_testnet._comment_gas_multiplier: Multiplier on top of base gas price for maxFeePerGas.
x1_testnet._comment_priority_multiplier: Multiplier on top of base gas price for maxPriorityFeePerGas.
x1_testnet._comment_gas_buffer_gwei: Extra Gwei held in reserve for gas costs when checking balance.

base_mainnet._comment: Base mainnet — disabled by default. Enable carefully, real ETH.
base_mainnet._comment_max_price_usd_equiv: Max price in USD equivalent (estimation only, not real USDC payment). null = skip check.
